description: Documentation gates for completed Nodics source documentation slices. Add a gate only after that module/layer is fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: nRouter runtime contract
enforcedGates.description: nRouter services, routers, and request pipelines define the runtime API contract and must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: nConfig complete startup and generation contract
enforcedGates.description: All nConfig runtime registries, configuration scripts, startup services, utilities, clean/build entrypoints, and governance tests must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: nCommon runtime shared contract
enforcedGates.description: nCommon shared error, interceptor, processor, promise, file, and scaffolding contracts must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: nDatabase runtime contract
enforcedGates.description: nDatabase schema, connection, model, MongoDB adapter, generated CRUD, router, pipeline, controller, facade, and database wrapper contracts must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: nPipeline runtime contract
enforcedGates.description: nPipeline executor, node model, default terminals, event listener, and runtime pipeline registry contracts must remain fully documented.

enforcedGates.name: nService runtime contract
enforcedGates.description: nService tenant, enterprise, auth, authorization, module communication, status, topology, and versioned service override contracts must remain fully documented.

reportOnlyGates.name: framework core rollout baseline
reportOnlyGates.description: Non-blocking visibility for the remaining core framework documentation rollout.
